g.text: - Reset election timer on valid RPC
- Collect votes until majority or timeout
T1 (Red Arrow): Election timeout fires, no heartbeat received from leader
T2 (Green Arrow): Candidate receives votes from majority of cluster
T3 (Blue Dashed): Candidate discovers higher term or valid leader
T4 (Purple Dashed): Leader discovers higher term in RPC/response

text.tspan: // electionTimer fires, no valid RPC received
// electionTimer fires, no valid RPC received
// In any RPC handler or response
// In any RPC handler or response

g.text: term++, vote for self, send RequestVote
update term, reset timer, clear vote if term changed
update term, step down, clear vote
